ground_truth.photographer_description: A photo from Paris with recognizable classical Parisian architecture. I expect it to get Paris both with and without metadata. There are no visible landmarks or other stuff to remark. Daytime, clear sky.

details.description: A wide Parisian street intersection with bold BUS lane and bicycle symbols painted on the asphalt and a zebra crosswalk. On the opposite corner stands a classic Haussmann-era corner building in cream limestone with wrought-iron balconies and a slate mansard roof with dormer windows. At street level is a café-brasserie with bright red awnings reading “Café Bullier,” with terrace tables set under the awnings. Leafy street trees line the sidewalks, traffic lights are visible, and the sky is clear and intensely blue, suggesting bright daylight.

details.description: Bright daylight Paris street scene featuring a classic Haussmann-style building with a beige stone façade, wrought-iron balconies, and mansard roof dormers. On the ground floor, a café with a red canopy labeled “Café Bullier” occupies the storefront, extending along the sidewalk. A wide intersection with bold bus lane markings and a zebra crossing is visible, with a few pedestrians and cyclists. The blue sky is clear, casting sharp shadows and creating strong contrasts characteristic of urban Parisian streetscapes.

details.description: Street-corner scene in Paris at a wide intersection with bold BUS lane and bicycle symbols painted on the asphalt, crosswalks, and traffic lights. A classic Haussmannian corner apartment building with cream stone facades, wrought‑iron balconies, and a dark slate mansard roof with dormer windows dominates the view. At ground level, a red‑awning café labeled “CAFÉ BULLIER” occupies the corner with outdoor seating beneath trees with fresh green foliage. The light is low, casting long shadows, and the sky is clear deep blue.

details.description: A sunlit Parisian street scene showing a row of Haussmann-style residential buildings with cream and beige stone façades, wrought-iron balconies, and slate mansard roofs. The ground floors host a café with a distinctive red awning and outdoor seating. Trees line the sidewalk, and a few pedestrians and a cyclist are visible at a crosswalk. In the foreground, large white road markings indicate a bus lane and a pedestrian crossing, and a circular traffic sign is on the right. The photo is taken from a street corner on Boulevard de Port-Royal, with a clear blue sky above.

details.description: A sunny, street-level view of a classic Parisian intersection featuring a prominent corner building in the Haussmannian architectural style. The building has a limestone facade, wrought-iron balconies on the upper floors, and a slate mansard roof with dormer windows. On the ground floor, a brasserie named "Le Bullier" (signed as BULLIER and CAFE BULLIER) is visible with bright red awnings shading the outdoor terrace. The foreground is dominated by a wide asphalt street with clear road markings, including a large "BUS" lane designation, bicycle symbols, and a pedestrian crossing. To the right, a utility pole supports traffic lights, a circular convex traffic mirror, and directional signage pointing towards "Denfert-Rochereau" and "Observatoire". Green trees line the street, contrasting with the deep blue sky.

details.description: A street-level view of a classic Parisian intersection on a clear, sunny day. The focal point is a corner building featuring traditional Haussmann-style architecture with a limestone facade, wrought-iron balconies, and a grey mansard roof with dormer windows. On the ground floor is 'Café Bullier,' identifiable by its prominent red awnings and outdoor seating. The foreground shows a wide asphalt street with white painted markings for a bus lane ('BUS') and a bicycle lane. A street sign on the right points towards 'Montparnasse,' 'Denfert-Rochereau,' and the 'Observatoire.' Bare trees and other Haussmann buildings line the street receding into the background.

details.description: Urban street corner with a classic Parisian Haussmann-era apartment block. The mid-rise building has cream limestone façades, continuous wrought-iron balconies, and a dark slate mansard roof with dormer windows. At street level is a corner café/brasserie with bright red awnings and outdoor terrace seating. The wide intersection features bold white BUS road markings and a bicycle symbol beside a red-painted reserved lane, plus zebra crosswalks. Leafy street trees line the sidewalks. Lighting is bright with a clear blue sky, suggesting daytime.

details.description: A sunlit central-Paris street corner featuring a classic Haussmann-style apartment building with a beige stone façade, tall multi-paned sash windows, and ornate wrought-iron balcony railings. The ground floor hosts a café with outdoor seating beneath a red awning, lining the sidewalk along a tree-filled avenue. A circular traffic sign and other street furniture are visible at the intersection, while bold white road markings and a red-painted curb indicate bike lanes and pedestrian areas. The sky is clear and deep blue, casting sharp shadows across the scene.

details.description: Sunny urban street corner with a wide zebra crosswalk and dedicated bus and bicycle lanes marked on the asphalt. A classic mid- to late-19th‑century Haussmann-style apartment block with cream stone façades, wrought‑iron balconies, and a slate mansard roof with dormer windows lines the intersection. At ground level a corner brasserie/café with bright red awnings and outdoor seating faces the street. Leafy street trees, traffic signage, and long afternoon shadows complete the scene under a deep blue sky.

details.description: A street-level photograph (oriented sideways with the top to the left) depicting a classic Parisian street scene under a bright blue sky. The primary subject is a traditional Haussmannian building featuring a cream-colored limestone facade, wrought-iron balconies on the second and fifth floors, and a slate mansard roof with dormer windows. On the ground floor, a restaurant named 'CAFE BULLIER' is clearly identifiable by its bright red awnings extending over the sidewalk. In the foreground, the asphalt street features prominent white painted road markings reading 'BUS' alongside a bicycle symbol, indicating a dedicated public transport and cycling lane. A red painted strip marks the edge of the lane. Green trees in full leaf partially obscure the building's facade, suggesting a spring or summer setting.

details.description: A street-level view in Paris, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise, showing a classic Haussmann-style apartment building at a corner. The building features a cream-colored stone facade, wrought-iron balconies, and a dark grey zinc mansard roof with dormer windows. On the ground floor, a cafe named 'BULLIER' (Café Bullier) is visible with a prominent red awning and outdoor seating. The street in the foreground has white painted markings for a 'BUS' lane and a bicycle lane. The sky is a clear, deep blue with a few light clouds. Long shadows are cast across the asphalt, suggesting early morning or late afternoon light.
